---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or integration
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## 💡 Motivation
Why do you want this feature? What problem does it solve?

## 📐 Proposed Solution
How would you like it to work?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've considered.

## 📦 Module
- [ ] AI Agent Builder
- [ ] Workflow Builder
- [ ] Browser Automation
- [ ] Multi-AI Chat
- [ ] File AI
- [ ] Prompt Library
- [ ] API Integrations
- [ ] Web Scraper
- [ ] Other: ___

## 📋 Additional Context
Any mockups, examples, or references.
